approach_summary: Followed intellij-code-reference SKILL: used IntelliJ MCP (PSI-indexed) over rg. search_symbol located the class, its @Bean factory, and a sibling strategy, plus the getStrategyName() return. Cross-checked with search_in_files_by_text for both the type name and the camelCase bean id, confirming no @Qualifier or getBean(name) usage. Traced the logical name 'OrderWorkflowAuditStrategy' through AuditStrategyDispatch: an ApplicationContextAware registry that builds a Map<String,AuditStrategy> keyed by getStrategyName() and exposes getAuditStrategy(name). Read the three core Java files and the frontend request.js slice to verify call sites. Reported file:line for registration (@Bean method), registry build, lookup API, runtime lookup call sites, and the frontend string-literal use.
